children.heading: Jurisdiction of courts
children.label: a Jurisdiction of courts
children.text: The district courts of the United States and the United States courts of the Territories shall have jurisdiction, for cause shown to restrain violations of , except paragraphs (h), (i), and (j).1section 331 of this titleSo in original. Probably should be followed by a comma.1

children.heading: Violation of injunction
children.label: b Violation of injunction
children.text: In case of violation of an injunction or restraining order issued under this section, which also constitutes a violation of this chapter, trial shall be by the court, or, upon demand of the accused, by a jury.
